faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about our platform and estimation tools.
faq.q1: How accurate is the AI estimation?
faq.a1: Our AI model is trained on thousands of real-world construction datasets. While accuracy varies by project complexity, our users typically report within 95-98% accuracy compared to final bill of quantities.
faq.q2: Can I import my existing Excel formulas?
faq.a2: Yes! Our formula builder is designed to be familiar to Excel users. You can create custom variables, link categories, and apply complex arithmetic for your structural and finishing calculations.
faq.q3: Do you offer trial periods for the Company plan?
faq.a3: Absolutely. We offer a 14-day full-access trial for firms to test out our team management features and unlimited AI estimation capabilities before committing.
